1.text: The concussive blast leaves the target's ears ringing. He suffers a –10 penalty to all tests for 1 round and is Deafened for [[1d5]] rounds.

2.text: The explosion sends shrapnel and debris into the target's face. He suffers 1 level of Fatigue and is Blinded for 1 round.

3.text: The blast wave ruptures an eardrum and peppers the target's face with fragments. He is Deafened for [[1d5]] hours (or until he receives medical attention) and is Stunned for 1 round.

4.text: The explosion tears away part of the target's scalp and shatters teeth. He suffers [[1d5]] levels of Fatigue and Blood Loss. He is Blinded for [[1d5]] rounds and Stunned for 1 round.

5.text: The concussive force fractures the target's skull and shreds his face with shrapnel. He is Stunned for [[1d5]] rounds and suffers Blood Loss. Permanently reduce his Fellowship and Perception characteristics by [[1d5]] each.

6.text: The blast destroys one of the target's eyes and drives fragments of bone into his brain. He suffers [[1d5]] levels of Fatigue and Blood Loss, and is Stunned for [[1d10]] rounds. Permanently reduce his Ballistic Skill and Perception characteristics by [[1d5]] each, and his Intelligence by 1.

7.text: The explosion caves in the target's skull, shattering bone and pulping brain matter. He suffers [[1d10]] levels of Fatigue and Blood Loss. Permanently reduce his Intelligence, Perception, and Fellowship characteristics by [[1d10]] each. He must make a Hard (–20) Toughness test or die.

8.text: The target's head is torn apart by the explosive force, scattering fragments of skull and brain in all directions. He is slain instantly.

9.text: The explosion detonates the target's skull, sending bone shrapnel flying. He is slain instantly. Each character within [[1d5]] metres must make a Challenging (+0) Agility test or suffer [[1d5]] Rending damage to a randomly determined Hit Location.

10.text: The target's head vanishes in a devastating blast, and the concussive force snaps his neck and shatters his collarbones. He is slain instantly. Each character within [[1d10]] metres must make a Challenging (+0) Agility test or suffer [[1d10]] Explosive damage to a randomly determined Hit Location from the rain of bone and gore. If the target was carrying any grenades or explosives, they detonate immediately with their normal effects.
